text:
UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Southern District of New York

In re: Maria T. Alvarez, Debtor
Case No. 26-10342-MEW          Chapter 13

NOTICE OF HEARING

PLEASE TAKE NOTICE that a hearing on confirmation of the debtor's Chapter 13 plan will be held before the Honorable Judge M.E. Wiles on July 9, 2026 at 10:00 AM in Courtroom 617, One Bowling Green, New York, NY 10004.

Objections to confirmation must be filed no later than seven days before the hearing date.

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Eastern District of New York

In re: Devon Carter, Debtor
Case No. 26-41877-JMM          Chapter 7

NOTICE OF CHAPTER 7 BANKRUPTCY CASE, MEETING OF CREDITORS, AND DEADLINES

The meeting of creditors under 11 U.S.C. Section 341(a) will be held on June 30, 2026 at 9:30 AM via telephonic appearance. Dial-in: (877) 555-0140, code 4421987.

The debtor must appear and be examined under oath. Creditors may attend but are not required to do so.

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
District of New Jersey

In re: Samuel and Rita Okafor, Debtors
Case No. 25-29914-ABA         Chapter 7

ORDER OF DISCHARGE

IT IS ORDERED: A discharge under 11 U.S.C. Section 727 is granted to the debtors. Collection of discharged debts is prohibited. Creditors cannot collect from the debtors personally on discharged debts.

/s/ Andrew B. Altenburg, Jr.
United States Bankruptcy Judge

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Southern District of Florida

In re: Kelly Nguyen, Debtor
Case No. 26-13320-LMI         Chapter 13

ORDER DISMISSING CASE

The debtor having failed to make plan payments as required, and upon the Trustee's motion to dismiss, IT IS ORDERED that this case is DISMISSED without prejudice. The automatic stay is terminated.

/s/ Laurel M. Isicoff
United States Bankruptcy Judge

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Northern District of Illinois

In re: Harold Brewster, Debtor
Case No. 26-07215-DRC         Chapter 7

NOTICE OF DEADLINE TO FILE PROOFS OF CLAIM

NOTICE IS GIVEN that assets may be available for distribution. Creditors who wish to share in any distribution must file a proof of claim on or before September 14, 2026. Claims filed after the deadline will not receive distribution except as permitted by law.

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Central District of California

In re: Joanna Reyes, Debtor
Case No. 26-11458-SK          Chapter 13

MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM THE AUTOMATIC STAY

Secured creditor Pacific Lending Trust moves this Court for an order granting relief from the automatic stay of 11 U.S.C. Section 362(a) with respect to real property located at 1822 Verdugo Rd, Glendale, CA, on the grounds that the debtor has failed to make post-petition mortgage payments for four consecutive months.

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
District of Massachusetts

In re: Patrick Doyle, Debtor
Case No. 26-10881-JEB         Chapter 7

NOTICE OF HEARING ON TRUSTEE'S MOTION TO SELL

A hearing on the Trustee's motion to sell estate property free and clear of liens will be held on August 3, 2026 at 2:00 PM before the Honorable Janet E. Bostwick, John W. McCormack Post Office and Court House, 5 Post Office Square, Boston, MA.

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Western District of Texas

In re: Brianna Holt, Debtor
Case No. 26-50677-CAG         Chapter 13

NOTICE OF MEETING OF CREDITORS

The Section 341(a) meeting of creditors is scheduled for July 21, 2026 at 11:00 AM, Hipolito F. Garcia Federal Building, Room 333, San Antonio, TX. The debtor must bring photo identification and proof of social security number.

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
District of Arizona

In re: Miguel Santos, Debtor
Case No. 23-04412-BKM        Chapter 13

ORDER OF DISCHARGE AFTER COMPLETION OF CHAPTER 13 PLAN

The debtor having completed all payments under the confirmed plan, IT IS ORDERED that the debtor is granted a discharge under 11 U.S.C. Section 1328(a).

/s/ Brenda K. Martin
United States Bankruptcy Judge

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Middle District of Tennessee

In re: Angela Pruitt, Debtor
Case No. 26-02156-RM         Chapter 13

NOTICE OF DEADLINE FOR FILING OBJECTIONS TO CONFIRMATION

Objections to confirmation of the debtor's proposed Chapter 13 plan must be filed and served no later than August 28, 2026. Absent timely objection, the plan may be confirmed without further notice or hearing.

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Eastern District of Michigan

In re: Curtis Webb, Debtor
Case No. 26-30901-DOF        Chapter 7

MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM STAY (VEHICLE)

Movant GreatLakes Auto Finance requests relief from the automatic stay as to a 2022 Honda CR-V, VIN 7FARW2H5XNE004821, asserting lack of adequate protection and debtor default on three post-petition payments.

U S BANKR CT

UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT
Southern District of New York

In re: Thomas Greer, Debtor
Case No. 26-10509-MEW        Chapter 13

NOTICE OF ADJOURNED HEARING

PLEASE TAKE NOTICE that the hearing previously scheduled on the debtor's motion to modify plan is ADJOURNED to September 2, 2026 at 11:30 AM before Judge M.E. Wiles, Courtroom 617, One Bowling Green, New York, NY.
